title: erycibe citriniflora
intro: Erycibe citriniflora, also known as the golden vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is a climbing vine native to tropical Asia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Erycibe citriniflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and can also be found in some traditional medicine products in the form of capsules or tinctures.
